title: SCR logos
description: This resourcepack adds logos of all the operators in SCR for Railway Signs.
body:
**Nostalgia version coming soon!**

Welcome to my SCR logo resource pack!                                                                      
This resourcepack adds: Stepford Connect logo (no text, with text, flipped text), Metro logo (no text, with text, flipped text), Stepford Express logo (no text, with text, flipped text),
Waterline logo (no text, with text, flipped text) and the Airlink logo (no text, with text, flipped text).                                                                                             
The Stepford Express logo might look goofy due to it being a rectangle.                               
This resource pack is not the best, it was first planned for personal use only.
Also, the version numbers are synced with the current version of SCR.

MTR mod needed!

----------------------
Check out my mod!
https://modrinth.com/mod/phones_mod
----------------------
